inputs.label: Gross Salary
inputs.businessContext: Employee's annual gross salary before taxes.

inputs.label: Tax Rate Bracket 1
inputs.businessContext: Tax rate for the first income bracket.

inputs.label: Tax Rate Bracket 2
inputs.businessContext: Tax rate for the second income bracket.

inputs.label: Tax Rate Bracket 3
inputs.businessContext: Tax rate for the third income bracket.

formulas.bracket1Tax: grossSalary <= bracket1Limit ? grossSalary * taxRate1 / 100 : bracket1Limit * taxRate1 / 100
formulas.bracket2Tax: grossSalary <= bracket1Limit ? 0 : grossSalary <= bracket2Limit ? (grossSalary - bracket1Limit) * taxRate2 / 100 : (bracket2Limit - bracket1Limit) * taxRate2 / 100
